name: United℠ Business Card

welcome_offer.description: 100,000 bonus United miles + 2,000 Premier Qualifying Points (PQP) after spending $5,000 in first 3 months. Additional 10,000 miles when adding an authorized user.

other_benefits.name: First Checked Bag Free
other_benefits.description: First checked bag free for cardmember and up to 4 companions on the same reservation (when paying with the card)

other_benefits.name: Premier Access
other_benefits.description: Premier Access travel services including priority check-in, security, and boarding

other_benefits.name: PQP Earnings
other_benefits.description: Earn up to 2,000 PQP per year (100 PQP per $5,000 spent, up to $20,000 = 2,000 PQP)

other_benefits.name: Expanded Award Availability
other_benefits.description: Access to expanded United MileagePlus award availability

other_benefits.name: Employee Cards at No Cost
other_benefits.description: Add employee cards at no additional cost

notes: Business version of United card. $150 AF. The $125 travel credit and 2 Club passes help offset the fee. PQP earnings (Premier Qualifying Points) are valuable for United elite status. 7 categories with 2x earning is broad. As of 2025, AF increased from $95 to $150. Best for business travelers who fly United frequently and want to earn toward status.

recurring_credits.name: Renowned Hotels & Resorts Credit
recurring_credits.description: Up to $200/year statement credit on Renowned Hotels & Resorts prepaid bookings.

recurring_credits.name: Avis/Budget TravelBank Credit
recurring_credits.description: Up to $50/year in United TravelBank cash for Avis/Budget rentals booked through cars.united.com.

recurring_credits.name: JSX Credit
recurring_credits.description: Up to $100/year statement credit on JSX flight bookings.

recurring_credits.name: FareLock Credit
recurring_credits.description: Up to $25/year statement credit after buying FareLock on a United/United Express-operated flight.

recurring_credits.name: Instacart Credit
recurring_credits.description: Up to $10/month Instacart credit when paying with the card. $120/year cap.

recurring_credits.name: DoorDash Non-Restaurant Credit
recurring_credits.description: Up to $10 off one qualifying non-restaurant DoorDash order each calendar quarter (DashMart, 7-Eleven, CVS, Safeway, etc.). Requires active DashPass enrollment. Per Chase cobrand-doordash terms.
